Metadata.title: Barbarian
Metadata.summary: In town for a job interview, a young woman arrives at her Airbnb rental late at night only to find that the house has been mistakenly double-booked and a strange man is already staying there. Against her better judgment, she decides to stay the night anyway, but soon discovers that there is much more to be afraid of in the house than the other house guest.
Metadata.tagline: Some stay for a night. Some stay for a week. Some never leave.

Metadata.title: Companion
Metadata.summary: Since Iris and Josh met in a supermarket, the two have been inseparable. Now they want to spend the weekend together with Josh's friends at the luxurious lake estate of Sergey. His mistress Kat, and friends Eli and Patrick will also be there. At first, Iris is unsure, convinced that everyone hates her. After a bumpy start, the six spend a boisterous evening together. But the following morning will change their lives forever.
Metadata.tagline: Find someone made just for you.

Metadata.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
Metadata.summary: Having moved from China, a middle-aged woman finds herself entangled in a wild journey. She alone holds the key to preserving reality, as she traverses alternate universes and encounters the various lives she might have lived.
Metadata.tagline: The universe is so much bigger than you realize.

Part.file: /Volumes/Plex_HD/Media/Movies/Everything Everywhere All at Once 2022 BluRay IMAX 1080p.H264 Ita Eng AC3 5.1 Sub Ita Eng realDMDJ.mkv

Metadata.title: La haine
Metadata.summary: After a chaotic night of rioting in a marginal suburb of Paris, three young friends, Vinz, Hubert and Saïd, wander around unoccupied waiting for news about the state of health of a mutual friend who has been seriously injured when confronting the police.
Metadata.tagline: How far you fall doesn't matter, it's how you land…

Metadata.title: The Housemaid
Metadata.summary: Trying to escape her past, Millie Calloway accepts a job as a live-in housemaid for the wealthy Nina and Andrew Winchester. But what begins as a dream job quickly unravels into something far more dangerous—a sexy, seductive game of secrets, scandal, and power.
Metadata.tagline: Discover what lies behind closed doors.

Metadata.title: It Was Just an Accident
Metadata.summary: An unassuming mechanic is reminded of his time in an Iranian prison when he encounters a man he suspects to be his sadistic jailhouse captor. Panicked, he rounds up a few of his fellow ex-prisoners to confirm the man's identity.

Part.file: /Volumes/Plex_HD/Media/Movies/www.UIndex.org    -    It Was Just An Accident (2025) 1080p WEBRip x265 10bit 5.1-WORLD/It.Was.Just.An.Accident.2025.1080p.WEBRip.x265.10bit.AAC5.1-WORLD.mp4

Metadata.title: Longlegs
Metadata.summary: FBI Agent Lee Harker is a gifted new recruit assigned to the unsolved case of an elusive serial killer. As the case takes complex turns, unearthing evidence of the occult, Harker discovers a personal connection to the merciless killer and must race against time to stop him before he claims the lives of another innocent family.

Metadata.title: Materialists
Metadata.summary: A young, ambitious New York City matchmaker (Dakota Johnson) finds herself torn between the perfect match (Pedro Pascal) and her imperfect ex (Chris Evans).

Metadata.title: The Menu
Metadata.summary: A young couple travels to a remote island to eat at an exclusive restaurant where the chef has prepared a lavish menu, with some shocking surprises.

Metadata.title: Nosferatu
Metadata.summary: A gothic tale of obsession between a haunted young woman and the terrifying vampire infatuated with her, causing untold horror in its wake.

Metadata.title: Shall We Dance?
Metadata.summary: Shohei Sugiyama has attained all that he has wanted in life. But he is still depressed and unhappy. One day, he gathers up the courage to sign up for dancing lessons. He hopes they will rid his depression and help him get his life back together.
Metadata.tagline: She's got the moves… but he's got two left feet!

Metadata.title: Sling Blade
Metadata.summary: Karl Childers, a mentally disabled man, has been in the custody of the state mental hospital since the age of 12 for killing his mother and her lover. Although thoroughly institutionalized, he is deemed fit to be released into the outside world.
Metadata.tagline: A simple man. A difficult choice.

Metadata.title: The Thin Red Line
Metadata.summary: The story of a group of men, an Army Rifle company called C-for-Charlie, who change, suffer, and ultimately make essential discoveries about themselves during the fierce World War II battle of Guadalcanal. It follows their journey, from the surprise of an unopposed landing, through the bloody and exhausting battles that follow, to the ultimate departure of those who survived.
Metadata.tagline: Every man fights his own war.

Metadata.title: The Whale
Metadata.summary: A reclusive, morbidly obese English teacher attempts to reconnect with his estranged teenage daughter.
